visual_attributes.morphology: Large bird with elongated train feathers extending from the rump
distinctive_features: Elongated upper tail covert feathers with colorful eyespots
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: 200–230 cm (78–90 in) including train, 4.1–5.2 kg (9–11.5 lb)
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: Train feathers arranged in a fan-like display during courtship

domain_specific_visual.EYESPOT_PATTERN: Purplish-black heart-shaped nucleus with blue and copper rim

domain_specific_functional.SYMBOLIC_ROLE: National bird of India, venerated in mythology
domain_specific_functional.ECOLOGICAL_ROLE: Forages for berries, grains, and small animals

relationships.description: The Indian Peacock is the national bird of India.
The Indian Peacock is revered in Hindu mythology.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents beauty, grace, and is a symbol of national pride
